statement: In every magma, Equation 494 (`x = y * (x * (z * (z * w)))`) implies Equation 4055 (`x * y = (z * (w * w)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0394
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op z (op z w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op w w)) y)
